name: Papaya Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream sugar with butter until light.
2. Add eggs and beat until fluffy.
3. Add papaya, nuts, and raisins and mix.
4. Sift flour with baking powder, soda, salt, cinnamon, allspice, and ginger.
5. Add to butter mixture.
6. Pour batter into greased waxed-paper-lined 9 x 5-inch loaf pan or greased muffin pans (3/4 full).
7. Bake at 325°F for about 1 hour 5 minutes or 25 minutes.
Makes 1 loaf or 16 muffins
